platform_warnings: End-of-life platform; verify IOS image feature set (e.g. securityk9, datak9) for advanced features.

feature_warnings.etherchannel: EtherChannel is not typically available on onboard router ports of this platform.
feature_warnings.layer2: Switchport commands require an EtherSwitch service module; onboard ports are routed only.
feature_warnings.svi: SVIs require an EtherSwitch service module.
feature_warnings.dmvpn: Requires an Advanced Security (or better) IOS image on ISR G1; verify the image feature set before use.
feature_warnings.ipsec: Requires an Advanced Security (or better) IOS image on ISR G1; verify the image feature set before use.
feature_warnings.zbf: Requires an Advanced Security (or better) IOS image on ISR G1; verify the image feature set before use.
feature_warnings.ikev2: IKEv2/FlexVPN requires IOS 15.1(1)T or later; it does not exist in IOS 12.4.
